description: A battle-worn scrap knight robot pet with a single glowing eye, asymmetrical arms, and a back-mounted ruined blade.

idle.notes: Single eye flicker with a subtle torso tremor.

walk.notes: Stiff, slightly jerky mechanical walking loop.

happy.notes: Eye brightens and the oversized heavy arm gives a gentle wave.

alert.notes: Head lifts, eye sharpens, and the back weapon tenses subtly.

sleep.notes: Head lowers and the eye light dims into a quiet nodding loop.

damaged.notes: Malfunction cycle with hunching posture and thin-arm seizure.
